title: Kili0601's Random Packs
description: A Collection of My modpacks that are to small for a Normal project
body: This is a project that serves as a collection of my modpacks without a gigantic project. It brings together various modpacks I’ve created, each designed for different playstyles and experiences. Whether you enjoy tech, magic, or exploration, this project acts as a sharing point to distribute my smaller modpacks easily. Additionally, this collection includes modpacks using multiple mod loaders, meaning one modpack could be for Fabric while another could be for Forge.
